title: Faust's Zweihander
description: Make your Sword/Mace/Weapon become Zweihander Faust style
body:
The resourcepack I made is **Faust's Zweihander** from weapon character **Faust**, **Limbus Company** made by **Project Moon**. There would be more I will made by the time I had but for now here you go!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/n_XoSZljaXE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

The Resourcepack is fully **Vanilla Custom Model Data** and **CIT Optifine**
For the command vanilla one you can check it bottom here :

<details>
<summary>Command - Custom Model Data</summary>

For singleplayer I use this command :
```
/give @p minecraft:diamond_sword{CustomModelData:1}
```


</details>

If you guys wanna use the animation-style weapon like me I suggest use the **Better Combat by ZsoltMolnarrr**, Here is the command to get the animation-style you want :

<details>
<summary>Command - Custom Model Data Better Combat</summary>

**Link Better Combat** :
[https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)

For Style I use is Scythe :

```
/give @p minecraft:diamond_sword{CustomModelData:1,weapon_attributes:'{"parent":"bettercombat:scythe"}'}
```


But since this weapon is similar to Claymore/Big Sword, here is the command :

```
/give @p minecraft:diamond_sword{CustomModelData:1,weapon_attributes:'{"parent":"bettercombat:claymore"}'}
```


If you guys wanna use different style weapon I suggest to check the GitHub by ZsoltMolnarrr
The link [GitHub](https://github.com/ZsoltMolnarrr/BetterCombat/tree/1.21.1/common/src/main/resources/data/bettercombat/weapon_attributes) is here, you can click it ^^

</details>

If you guys just prefer rename you can use CIT by shsupercm or Optifine

**Link CIT Resewn** :
[https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)

**Link Optifine** :
[https://optifine.net/home](https://optifine.net/home)

![Rename on Anvil. using CIT Resewn](https://images2.imgbox.com/08/1e/G02bHDHm_o.png)

You can change it by using all variant Swords, but if you guys wanna use it for different tools then feel free to change it :D but please **don't claim it as your own made model**, If you guys wanna move it to different version feel free to change it again.

Credit me if you guys wanna use it for Content or for Mod/Modpack, Really appreciate it if you guys did it ^^
